item.title: ZIFA suspends three referees over shoddy officiating - NewZimbabwe
item.description: THE Zimbabwe Football Association (ZIFA) has suspended three match officials over poor performance during the Bulawayo Chiefs versus Dynamos match played recently. The three suspended officials are Nelson Meke, Taurai Muranganwa, and Mcendesi Maphosa. Meke served as the centre referee during the controversial game, while Maphosa and Muranganwa were the first and second assistant referees, […]
